changes: Berserk: The additional effect 'Extends Storm's Eye duration by 15s to a maximum of 60s' has been added.
Mythril Tempest: The combo bonus 'Extends Storm's Eye duration by 10s to a maximum of 30s' has been changed to 'Extends Storm's Eye duration by 30s to a maximum of 60s.'
Storm's Eye: Now extends Storm's Eye duration by 30s to a maximum of 60s.
Inner Release: The additional effect 'Extends Storm's Eye duration by 15s to a maximum of 60s' has been added.
Nascent Flash: No longer requires a target party member to execute.
Brutal Shell: Cure potency has been increased from 150 to 200. Effect duration has been increased from 10 to 30 seconds. Barrier effect can now be refreshed.
Perfect Balance: Recast time has been reduced from 120 to 90 seconds.
Form Shift: Additional effect extending the duration of Greased Lightning no longer requires Coeurl Form.
Sidewinder: Potency when target is suffering from both Caustic Bite and Stormbite has been increased from 300 to 350.
Refulgent Arrow: Potency has been increased from 330 to 340.
Burst Shot: Potency has been increased from 230 to 240.
Hypercharge: Description now clearly states the Overheat effect only applies to machinist actions.
Tri-disaster: Potency has been reduced from 300 to 150.
Succor: MP cost has been reduced from 1,300 to 1,100.
Lightspeed: The effect 'Reduces MP cost for spells by 50%' has been removed.
Helios: MP cost has been reduced from 900 to 700.
Benefic II: MP cost has been reduced from 900 to 700.
Draw: The additional effect 'Restores 8% of maximum MP' has been added.
Aspected Benefic: MP cost when under the effect of Diurnal Sect has been reduced from 500 to 400. MP cost when under the effect of Nocturnal Sect has been reduced from 900 to 700.
Aspected Helios: MP cost has been reduced from 1,000 to 800.
Combust II: MP cost has been reduced from 500 to 400.

Sleeve Draw: The effect of this action has been completely revamped. Now draws a card (arcanum) from your divining deck; cannot draw an arcanum if aligned with its Seal of Arcana (when aligned with all three, any may be drawn); adds effect: Restores 8% of maximum MP.
Horoscope: The healing effect can now also be triggered when the effect of Horoscope or Horoscope Helios expires.
Neutral Sect: When executed while Nocturnal Sect is active, the healing over time effects of both Aspected Benefic and Aspected Helios can now be stacked.
Reprisal: Reduction to target's damage dealt has been changed from 10% to 20%.
Concentrate: Recast time has been reduced from 30 to 15 seconds.
Drain: Maximum potency has been increased from 1,800 to 2,400.
Addle: Reduction to target's damage dealt has been changed from 20% to 40%.
Swiftcast: Recast time has been reduced from 30 to 15 seconds.
Manaward: Recast time has been reduced from 45 to 30 seconds.
Aetheric Burst: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 45 seconds.
Attunement: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 30 seconds.
Rescue: Effect now ignores knockback resistance and can no longer be prevented by enfeeblements; The additional effect 'Removes Holmgang effect from target' has been added.
Confiteor: Additional effect now also lowers target's healing potency by 10%.
Hallowed Ground: Recast time has been reduced from 90 to 60 seconds; Effect duration has been reduced from 6 to 5 seconds.
Testudo: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 45 seconds.
Heavy Swing: The additional effect 'Increases Beast Gauge by 10' has been added.
Shake It Off: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 45 seconds.
Chaotic Cyclone: Increase to target's damage taken has been changed from 5% to 10%.

Edge of Shadow: Reduction to target's HP recovered by healing actions has been changed from 20% to 10%; Duration of effect reducing target's HP recovered by healing actions has been increased from 6 to 10 seconds.
Flood of Shadow: Duration of effect reducing target's HP recovered by healing actions has been increased from 6 to 10 seconds.
Dark Missionary: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 45 seconds.

Bow Shock: The additional effect 'Removes all Regen and barrier effects from targets' has been removed; The Draw Power bonus 'Heavy +50%' has been added; The Draw Fortitude bonus 'Bind' has been added.
Lightning Shot: The additional effect 'Extends Fast Draw duration to maximum' has been removed; The additional effect 'Increases potency of next weaponskill by 50%' has been added.
Gnashing Fang: The additional effect 'Grants Fast Draw, reducing weaponskill recast time by 5%' has been removed; The additional effect 'Absorbs 100% of damage dealt as HP' has been added.
Savage Claw: The additional effect 'Grants Fast Draw, reducing weaponskill recast time by 5%' has been removed; The additional effect 'Absorbs 100% of damage dealt as HP' has been added.
Wicked Talon: The additional effect 'Grants Fast Draw, reducing weaponskill recast time by 5%' has been removed; The additional effect 'Absorbs 100% of damage dealt as HP' has been added.
Burst Strike: The additional effect 'Grants Fast Draw, reducing weaponskill recast time by 5%' has been removed.
Fated Circle: The additional effect 'Grants Fast Draw, reducing weaponskill recast time by 5%' has been removed.
Draw and Junction: New action added.
Heart of Light: Removed.
Riddle of Earth: Barrier strength has been increased from a heal potency of 2,000 to 2,500.
Tornado Kick: Potency has been increased from 1,800 to 2,000.
The Forbidden Chakra: Potency has been increased from 1,800 to 2,000.
Hissatsu: Chiten: Potency has been increased from 1,000 to 1,200.
Quick Nock: Potency has been increased from 600 to 800.
Empyreal Arrow: Potency has been increased from 800 to 1,000.
Repelling Shot: Potency has been increased from 400 to 800.
Spread Shot: Potency has been increased from 600 to 800.
Auto Crossbow: Potency has been increased from 1,400 to 1,600.
Ricochet: Potency has been increased from 600 to 800.
Wildfire: Portion of damage compiled has been increased from 25% to 33%.
Bioblaster: Potency has been increased from 1,400 to 1,600.
Blank: Potency has been increased from 600 to 800.
Air Anchor: Potency has been increased from 1,600 to 2,000.
Fire: MP cost has been increased from 0 to 1,000; Increase to damage dealt from Astral Fire has been changed from 10% to 20%.
Blizzard: Reduction to spell cast and recast times from Umbral Ice has been changed from 10% to 20%.
Fire IV: MP cost has been reduced from 2,500 to 2,000.
Flare: MP cost has been reduced from 5,000 to 4,000; Increase to damage dealt from Astral Fire has been changed from 10% to 20%.
Freeze: Reduction to spell cast and recast times from Umbral Ice has been changed from 10% to 20%.
Thunder: Cast time has been made instant.
Thunder II: Cast time has been made instant.
Xenoglossy: Potency has been reduced from 3,200 to 2,400.
Foul: Potency has been reduced from 2,400 to 1,800; Cast time has been made instant.
Enochian: Time required to acquire Polyglot has been reduced from 30 to 15 seconds.
Night Wing: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 45 seconds.
Outburst: Cast time has been reduced from 2 to 1.5 seconds.
Fester: Potency has been increased from 800 to 1,000.
Painflare: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 45 seconds.
Biolysis: Reduction to target's HP recovered by healing actions has been changed from 20% to 15%.
Dissipation: Increase to healing potency has been changed from 50% to 40%.

Combust III: The additional effect 'Lengthens weaponskill cast time and recast time as well as spell cast time and recast time of target by 10%' has been changed to 'Reduces target's damage dealt and healing potency by 10%.'
Divination: Recast time has been reduced from 90 to 60 seconds.

new_content.name: The Heroes' Gauntlet
new_content.description: A new dungeon introduced in Patch 5.3.

new_content.name: The Puppets' Bunker
new_content.description: A new alliance raid dungeon developed by Yoko Taro and Yosuke Saito.

new_content.name: Akh Afah Amphitheatre (Unreal)
new_content.description: An Unreal trial, designed as a high-level challenge version of a familiar duty.

new_content.name: In the Name of the Light
We Can Rebuild Her
new_content.description: New Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Sleep Now in Sapphire
new_content.description: New Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: O Crafter, My Crafter
new_content.description: Custom Deliveries quest for Ehll Tou.

new_content.name: An Ode to Unity
new_content.description: Custom Deliveries quest for Ehll Tou.

new_content.name: Fantastic Mr. Faux
new_content.description: Quest to unlock Faux Hollows and Unreal trials.

new_content.name: It's Dwarfin' Time
new_content.description: Main quest to unlock dwarf tribe daily quests.

new_content.name: Faux Hollows
new_content.description: A mini-game accessed after completing an Unreal trial.

new_content.name: Quest Sync
new_content.description: Automatic level adjustment system for dwarf tribe quests.

new_content.name: Trial Synthesis
new_content.description: A system allowing players to practice crafting recipes without consuming materials.

new_content.name: Sundry Splendors
new_content.description: A consolidated shop system for gear and items exchangeable for tomestones and scrips.

housing.name: Small Smithy Walls
housing.description: A set of four walls designed for those who wish to transform their estate into a smithy.

housing.name: Medium Smithy Walls
housing.description: A set of four walls designed for those who wish to transform their estate into a smithy.

housing.name: Large Smithy Walls
housing.description: A set of four walls designed for those who wish to transform their estate into a smithy.

housing.name: Factory Interior Wall
housing.description: An industrial wall resembling those seen in the Copied Factory.

housing.name: Factory Flooring
housing.description: Rusted metal factory flooring.

housing.name: Factory Chandelier
housing.description: A rusted metal lighting fixture unlike any to which you are accustomed.

housing.name: Wooden Footbridge
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing - For those who find walking on the ground simply too pedestrian.

housing.name: Gulg Planter
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing - An alpine shrub from the heights of Kholusia.

housing.name: Nomad's Tent
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing - A little piece of the Azim Steppe, created by trade-minded Xaela using traditional methods and materials.

housing.name: Red Brick Kitchen
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing - This rustic outdoor cooking facility is more than capable of keeping any amount of garden party guests well fed.

housing.name: Floor Sofa
housing.description: Furnishing - A spacious seating option for those who prefer to remain at floor level.

housing.name: Indoor Pond
housing.description: Furnishing - Bring the outdoors indoors with this perfect imitation of nature.

housing.name: Factory Automatic Door
housing.description: Furnishing - The internal mechanisms that allow this door to open and close on its own remain something of a mystery.

housing.name: Factory Partition
housing.description: Furnishing - A rusted chain-link barrier.

housing.name: Factory Bench
housing.description: Furnishing - An iron bench that remains sturdy despite having seen better days.

housing.name: Marble Alcove Bed
housing.description: Furnishing - This indulgent bed frame constitutes an entire wall.

housing.name: Verdant Shelf Partition
housing.description: Table - A charming open partition with ample shelf space in the middle and overflowing planters above.

housing.name: Wooden Staircase Bookshelf
housing.description: Table - Versatile book storage that doubles as tiered shelving for other knickknacks.

housing.name: Sapphire Weapon Bust
housing.description: Tabletop - The chest of this Garlond Ironworks scale replica of a select portion of the Sapphire Weapon glows ominously.

housing.name: Ironfrog Keeper
housing.description: Tabletop - This diminutive automaton has ample space for storing the energy-rich crystals.

housing.name: Gemseeker's Pack
housing.description: Tabletop - This bag is bursting with unpolished gems and crystals.

housing.name: Dwarven Floor Lamp
housing.description: Tabletop - A low-lying lamp designed for use in narrow, enclosed spaces.

housing.name: Takoyaki Boat
housing.description: Tabletop - A steaming and sauce-slathered serving of enough doughy fried octopus to share.

housing.name: Barrel Table
housing.description: Tabletop - This reused cask screams adventure.

housing.name: Giant Beaver Burger Set
housing.description: Tabletop - No actual beavers were harmed in the making of this massive burger.

housing.name: Factory Railing
housing.description: Tabletop - An industrial safety rail.

housing.name: Sliced Watermelon
housing.description: Tabletop - This juicy, fresh-cut watermelon makes the perfect summer treat.

housing.name: Cracked Arch Window
housing.description: Wall-mounted - Too competent to smash your own windows? This is the product for you!

housing.name: Industrial Wall Pipes
housing.description: Wall-mounted - These decorative pipes were designed by the employees of Garlond Ironworks.

housing.name: Watts's Sketches
housing.description: Wall-mounted - Illustrations depicting a concept for a form of wheeled transportation.

housing.name: Bluebird Mobile
housing.description: Wall-mounted - A revolving display of bluebirds.

housing.name: Stage Curtain
housing.description: Wall-mounted - This sumptuous curtain impresses upon audiences that what they are about to witness is no two-gil production.

housing.name: Factory Grate
housing.description: Wall-mounted - A rusted piece of grating.

housing.name: Factory Staircase
housing.description: Wall-mounted - These metallic stairs make a satisfying clunking noise when stepped on.

housing.name: Factory Beam
housing.description: Wall-mounted - A giant steel beam.

housing.name: Factory Wall Lamp
housing.description: Wall-mounted - A grimy lamp extracted from the machine graveyard.
